text.message: U dont wanna trade with me?
You stole 2times from me remember that :)
You would of not done the same if you were me ?
Cause im fighitng with orangeand ur helping him :)
Yes but it's not my fight tho
I don't say I will focus you the all game but at the time you are first
I wonder why you had 23% win rate ...
You have rly good setup, you could win the game vut no you decide to focus someone who steal from you on road 2 bahahah
And its highest than all of you
Lmao you had 23% on ranked previous season
Just olay and do ur best :)
Lmaooo my poor man just realized he can't win in ranked
And this game illustrate that very well
He has the best setup in the game but still loose because he can't handle his frustration, pretty sad
After least oj and red having great game!
And tiu will probably drop under 25% this season after this loose, that makes me smile ahah
